steps.title: Use the narrator's distance
steps.content: The narrator says he spoke very little to his sisters and did not concern himself with their dolls and giggling. In context, the phrase means that he did not pay attention to or take interest in those activities.

steps.title: Reject unrelated meanings
steps.content: A means to make something, which does not fit his attitude. B adds anger that the passage never shows. D means to gain through effort, which is unrelated to attention or interest. The answer is C.
